skills.name: Test automation & frameworks
skills.detail: C#.NET, TypeScript, Java, Selenium, Appium, Playwright, SpecFlow, Reqnroll, RestSharp, Visual Studio, AI-assisted scripting

skills.name: Manual testing & strategy
skills.detail: Functional System Testing, Exploratory Testing, Risk-based Testing, Test case management, User acceptance testing (UAT) facilitation, AI-assited test design and execution

skills.name: Multi-platform system testing
skills.detail: Web UIs, Mobile (iOS/Android), Desktop applications, Oracle Corebanking, SalesforceCRM, SAP IS-U, eCommerce

skills.name: Integration & data validation
skills.detail: API / Web services testing, MS SQL database, Oracle database, Dapper, Charles Proxy

skills.name: Defect lifecycle & triage leadership
skills.detail: Root cause analysis, cross-team defect triage leadership, Azure DevOps/Jira tracking, regression management

skills.name: Agile leadership & delivery
skills.detail: Scrum Master (SAFE 4.6), Managing large test teams, stakeholder reporting, Hypercare/BAU coordination

experiences.summary: Spearheaded end-to-end core banking system upgrades and complex integrations using Azure DevOps and SQL, leading a team of seven testers while engineering comprehensive test plans and driving cross-team defect resolution.
highlights: Led a team of 7 testers delivering end-to-end, regression, and production validation for an oracle core banking transformation.
Coordinated program-wide E2E testing enabling successful deployment of a core banking system upgrade.
Acted as SME for complex system integrations (Salesforce & SAP IS-U) specifically for Distributed Energy Systems and Rewards
Drove test strategy, defect management, and stakeholder reporting across multiple projects and teams.
Mentored testers and improved delivery quality through structured test planning and automation support.

experiences.role: Lead Quality Engineer | Senior Quality Engineer
experiences.summary: Directed multi-platform quality engineering processes and led technical training initiatives by designing and executing automated test frameworks across Web, Mobile, and APIs using C#.NET, Java, Selenium, Cucumber, and Appium.
highlights: Specialised in test automation using C#, Selenium and Azure DevOps pipeline.
Led automation and functional testing across mobile, web, API, and database layers in banking and manufacturing domains.
Developed automation solutions using Selenium, Appium, C#, and Java to improve efficiency and coverage.
Acted as a trainer and mentor, delivering hands-on training for Selenium, Appium, and C# to uplift team capabilities.
Directed cross-functional QA teams and implemented quality engineering processes at program level.
Collaborated globally to ensure requirement clarity, defect resolution, and high-quality releases.

experiences.summary: Combined technical agility and agile leadership by acting as a Scrum Master for a code migration while setting up a Selenium C# test automation framework and performing cross-device mobile frontend/backend verification using Charles Proxy.
highlights: Managed testing across multiple mobile and web applications spanning various industries and platforms.
Implemented Selenium automation frameworks and improved QA processes for faster delivery.
Performed cross-device and cross-platform testing ensuring frontend and backend reliability.
Acted as Scrum Master facilitating agile ceremonies and supporting development lifecycle.

experiences.summary: Enhanced testing efficiency for desktop retail applications by developing custom Excel VBA/Macro codes for complex financial data validation and automating front-end regression test suites with HP QTP.
highlights: Executed UAT testing for desktop applications and ensured system reliability and accuracy.
Developed Excel VBA automation to validate forecasting and reduce manual computation effort.
Automated regression testing using HP QTP to improve testing consistency.
Managed defect lifecycle and supported data validation processes.

experiences.summary: Demonstrated versatile analytical skills by acting as a Business Analyst to gather requirements and author Gherkin user stories, while executing cross-browser functional testing backed by MS SQL database validation.
highlights: Performed functional and cross-browser testing for .NET-based applications with SQL data validation.
Gathered requirements, wrote user stories, and contributed to solution design as a Business Analyst.
Collaborated with stakeholders to align business needs with technical delivery.
Supported application migration projects and ensured quality throughout development.

experiences.summary: Managed large-scale testing operations of up to 20 resources for a major eCommerce telecom platform, steering regression testing, web services validation, and complex data management using HP ALM.
highlights: Led QA teams of up to 20 testers across functional and regression testing for telecom eCommerce systems.
Managed defect triage, test data strategy, and release coordination for large-scale projects.
Oversaw test execution for UI and web services ensuring system functionality and reliability.
Took on multiple leadership roles including Regression Lead, Release Lead, and Data Management Lead.
